_patch_meta.description: Group description correction — sorrow (Registry 151): groups 6427-001 (H2490B cha.lal) and 6428-001 (H2490I cha.lal) had identical descriptions not grounded in the anchor verse. Both anchor on Psa 109:22. Descriptions revised to reflect the verse directly. Dimension assigned to 6428-001 (Affective/Emotional, CLAUDE_AI) to complete C05 Phase C.

set.context_description: Term names the wounded, stricken heart of the afflicted person — the inner-being condition of one who is poor, needy, and inwardly pierced by their affliction
set.notes: Revised during Dimension Review Phase B: prior description was generic and not grounded in anchor verse (Psa 109:22). Duplication with 6428-001 (H2490I) confirmed — both entries point to the same verse token. Description rewritten to reflect verse content directly.
